candidate_definition_hints.text: Code and Data artifact for NeurIPS 2023 paper - "Monitor-Guided Decoding of Code LMs with Static Analysis of Repository Context". `multispy` is a lsp client library in Python intended to be used to build applications around language servers.
Alternative title: Guiding Language Models of Code with Global Context using Monitors

candidate_glosses.text: Alternative title: Guiding Language Models of Code with Global Context using Monitors

source_repo_description: Code and Data artifact for NeurIPS 2023 paper - "Monitor-Guided Decoding of Code LMs with Static Analysis of Repository Context". `multispy` is a lsp client library in Python intended to be used to build applications around language servers.
